assertions.reason: The auth review narrates the required flows end-to-end, including login, refresh, logout, /me, profile, password-change/reset, admin and super-admin resets, MFA, disabled-user handling, and lockout behavior.

evidence.observed: Entrypoints table lists login, refresh-token, logout, `/me`, profile read/update, password change, public forgot/reset, deprecated super-admin forgot alias, self-service MFA, admin reset/status/MFA override, and super-admin support reset.

Narrative sections cover `## 1. Login and token issuance narrative` through `## 8. Disabled-user and lockout behavior narrative`, plus `## Invariants`, `## Side effects`, and `## Failure points and recovery behavior`.
Read-only validator found all required topic markers: login, refresh, logout, `/me`, profile, password change, forgot/reset, admin and super-admin reset, MFA lifecycle, disabled-user, and lockout.

assertions.reason: The auth review includes explicit security, privacy, and protocol/protection findings with severity-tagged entries and code-path evidence.

evidence.observed: Contains dedicated sections `## Token/session handling`, `## Security findings`, `## Data privacy`, and `## Protocol/protection`.
Read-only validator confirmed presence of `## security findings`, `## data privacy`, `## protocol/protection`, and severity markers such as `| high |`.

frictions: Task tool delegation to user-testing-flow-validator failed in this environment with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; validation fell back to direct in-session docs inspection per .factory/library/user-testing.md.

Passive runtime probes were degraded (`curl -sf http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` exited 7 and TCP connect to 127.0.0.1:5433 was refused), but foundation-review assertions were documentation-only and remained testable through docs/code-review/**.
